title: Notice of diverting traffic to the Langeberg Mall to the newly constructed access
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Traffic to and from the...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - Traffic to and from the Langeberg Mall will be switched over to the newly constructed access to the mall on 5 of September 2025 (weather permitting).","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - Traffic to and from the Langeberg Mall will be switched over to the newly constructed access to the mall on 5 of September 2025 (weather permitting)."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Motorists will in future access the mall from Depot Road as shown on the attached."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Western Cape Government is working hard to maintain our roads.","html":"The Western Cape Government is working hard to maintain our roads."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Please drive carefully during this period of construction.","html":"Please drive carefully during this period of construction."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Let us work together to ensure that our roads are safe. For you.","html":"Let us work together to ensure that our roads are safe. For you."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Langeberg Mall entrance.","html":"Langeberg Mall entrance."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
